title: Agentic ALZ roadmap item
description: Shape of a single roadmap item parsed by scripts/squad_bootstrap.py from ROADMAP.md. Each item becomes a GitHub issue keyed by the marker `<!-- roadmap-id: {id} -->`. Items with `agent_eligible: true` and all `depends_on` closed are auto-assigned to the Copilot cloud agent.

id.description: Stable, unique slug used as the idempotency key in the issue marker.

title.description: Issue title; should be imperative and self-contained.

milestone.description: Milestone the issue belongs to. Bootstrap script ensures it exists.

summary.description: One-paragraph context for the work item.

acceptance_criteria.description: Bullet list of verifiable acceptance criteria.

labels.description: Labels to apply (and create if missing). Conventionally area:* and type:*.

agent_eligible.description: If true, the bootstrap script assigns @copilot when all `depends_on` are closed and no `human-only` label is present. Defaults to false to keep destructive/sensitive work human-driven.

depends_on.description: Other roadmap ids that must be closed before this item is eligible for auto-assignment.

repo.description: Reserved for future fan-out to sibling repos (alz-platform, alz-firewall-policy, alz-workloads/*). When omitted, defaults to the current repo.

playbook.description: Filename (no path) of the docs/playbooks/ entry that governs the work item. When omitted, scripts/squad_bootstrap.py.derive_playbook derives a default from labels in this precedence order: area:firewall -> 07-firewall-lib-exemplar.md, area:ci -> 08-ci-workflow-change.md, area:llm/area:prompts/area:schemas -> 04-prompt-or-schema-change.md, area:security -> 05-policy-change.md, area:terraform/area:bicep -> 06-iac-template-change.md, area:operate -> 02-bug-fix.md, area:bootstrap -> 08-ci-workflow-change.md, type:docs -> 03-doc-only.md. Fallback is 00-task-router.md.
